summary: A Go-based CLI tool with MCP integration and a test runner, heavily augmented by automated agent-generated test suites.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra tests suggests potential instability or flakiness requiring extensive coverage
scattered test directories across multiple agent iterations indicate possible test maintenance burden
uncommitted staged and modified files in working tree
suggestions: consolidate or clean up the numerous agent-generated extra test directories
review runner and MCP handler logic to reduce the need for defensive extra testing
commit or stash the current working tree changes to maintain a clean state
focus on the core runner and MCP handler implementations for feature work
